commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 15:24 And Shebaniah, and Jehoshaphat, and Nethanel, and Amasai, and Zechariah, and Benaiah, and Eliezer, the priests, did blow with the trumpets before the ark of God: and Obed-edom and Jehiah were doorkeepers for the ark. Jehias is called Jehiel, ver. He, Obededom, Barachias, and Elcana, (ver. ) were probably the four chief porters who attended the ark in arms; and others were, afterwards, stationed at the temple, chap. The two former took part also in the music, ver. (Calmet) Perhaps two preceded and two went behind the ark, to keep off the crowd. (Menochius).
